The dimensions given in the product name indicate the overall width and height of the board including the aluminium frame, which is approximately 2 cm wide. Of course, you're up against competition, so you have to consider every step well. The game is based on a secret auction system that determines the order of moves. Bolder offers will give you more options but fewer action points to move forward.
